allow: Bash(node -e "const f=require\('fs'\);const s=f.readFileSync\('d:/Workspace/clock-extension/timezones.js','utf8'\);const m=s.replace\('window.TIMEZONES =','module.exports ='\);f.writeFileSync\('d:/tmp_tz.js',m\);const t=require\('d:/tmp_tz.js'\);const c=Object.keys\(t\);let cities=0;for\(const k of c\)cities+=Object.keys\(t[k]\).length;console.log\('countries='+c.length+' cities='+cities\);f.unlinkSync\('d:/tmp_tz.js'\)")
